purpose: Agent wrapper — layered .sgf/ context injection, cl binary
Pipeline orchestration — declarative TOML-defined multi-iter workflows with context passing, sentinel-based transitions, and stall recovery
Specification management — forma daemon and fm CLI
Agent persistent memory — SQLite-backed issue/task tracker with pn CLI
Iterative Claude Code runner — invokes cl (claude-wrapper) with NDJSON formatting, completion detection, and git auto-push
Session resume — persist Claude session IDs and loop config to enable resuming interrupted sessions via sgf resume
Shared graceful shutdown — double-press Ctrl+C/Ctrl+D detection with confirmation prompts
CLI entry point — scaffolding, prompt delivery, loop orchestration, recovery, and daemon lifecycle
Integration test harness — shared fixtures, concurrency control, and mock infrastructure for springfield CLI tests
Shared VCS utilities — git HEAD detection, auto-push
